items.title: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin

items.title: How Trump's White House ballroom plan has doubled in size and cost over a year

items.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down

items.summary: Handy, 81, is known for his roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick.

items.title: Ex-wife of Dubai ruler's nephew in custody, prosecutors say
items.summary: Zeynab Javadli had not been in contact with any of her friends since Tuesday.

items.title: Mangrove forests are healing after decades of human destruction

items.summary: The auction has already brought in thousands in bids and includes intimate items from her life.

items.summary: Budapest's liberal Mayor Gergely Karacsony had been charged with helping to organise the banned 2025 march.

items.summary: The opposition has called for protests after the president's term in office was extended by a year.

The bill to fund immigration agencies has been delayed by opposition to Trump's 
'anti-weaponisation fund'.
